---
title: "2025 Cancer Incidence Rates in Georgia"
format: 
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

<!-- Note: Move this file into your main directory before previewing. The filepaths used below will not work if you keep it in the solutions/ directory. -->

## Group 1

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
library(DT)

# load data
georgia_cases <- readRDS("georgia_cases.RDS")

# load mapping function
source("helpers.R")
```

```{r}
#| label: map
#| fig-height: 6

create_incidence_map(georgia_cases, rate = TRUE)
```

## Group 2 

### Row {height=30%}

```{r}
#| label: income

plot_incidence_by_demographic(georgia_cases, RE)
```

### Data

```{r}
#| label: data-table

datatable(georgia_cases, options = list(pageLength = 10, bPaginate = TRUE, dom = 'ltipr'))
```
